name: Cron failure streak
triggers: same cron or job fails multiple times in a row
scheduled task misses expected success window
classification_rules: if error text is auth-related then likely credential_or_connector_drift
if timeout occurs under heavy load then likely overlap_or_resource_contention
if repeated schema or tooling failure then likely integration_contract_drift
verification_checks: correlated system pressure subsides if causal
improvement_prompts: Should this cron emit richer structured outcomes?
Should overlapping jobs be staggered by policy?
Should auth drift have its own pre-incident detector?
